title: National Dosimetry Services account: Pay your account - Canada.ca
content:
## Your NDS account: Pay your account
- Apply for dosimetry services and order dosimeters
- Manage your billing statements
- Request additional services
Health Canada's National  Dosimetry Services (NDS) offers multiple convenient ways to pay your account.  Review the payment methods listed below to choose the option that works best  for you.

## Online Credit Card Payment
Pay your account using Health Canada's Common Online  Payment System for immediate processing.
To complete your payment, please  ensure the following information is entered correctly:
- Group Number (Group Account Number): only one Group Number can be processed  per transaction. Ensure to include your full Group Number “alphanumeric” to  avoid payment errors. You must include the letter in front of your group number  when paying.
- Payment Option: Select Pay a  Dosimetry Account
For full details, visit the How  to Pay Health Canada Fees webpage.
Pay your account by credit  card over the phone by calling our Client Services team at 1-800-261-6689. Please allow 3-5 business days for processing.
To complete your payment, have  the following information ready:
- Full  credit card number and expiry date
- Cardholder’s  name as it appears on the  credit card
Accepted Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express

## Online  Banking through Canadian Financial Institution (via Bill Payment Service -BPS)
Pay your account through your bank's  online services or mobile banking app. To complete your payment, have  the following information ready:
- 8 digit Client ID Number : Found on your Account Activity Report (AAR) or Billing Statement  (below the Group Account #). Only one Client ID Number can be processed  per transaction. Ensure to include your full Client ID Number to avoid payment  issues.
- Payee Selection : Choose "Health Canada NDS" as the payee
For full details, visit the How to Pay Health Canada Fees webpage.

## Cheque, Money Order or Bank Draft
Pay your account by cheque,  money order or bank draft. Please ensure to include the following details with  your payment:
- Group Number, ensure  to include your full group number “alphanumeric” to avoid payment issues. You  must include the letter in front of your group number when paying.
- Multiple       Group Numbers: list each group number and its corresponding       payment amount
- Organization's       Name
- Made       Payable to the Receiver General of Canada
Include the top tear-off  portion of your Account Activity Report (AAR) and mail to the address shown  on your AAR. Keep a copy for your records.
For full details, visit the How  to Pay Health Canada Fees webpage.

## Wire Transfer/Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT)
Pay your account via EFT.  After completing your deposit, send a payment remittance email to EFT-TEF@hc-sc.gc.ca within 60 days . If the remittance is not received within this  timeframe, the funds will be returned.
Your email must include:
- Group Number(s) and total payment amount. Ensure to include your full group number  “alphanumeric” to avoid payment issues. You must include the letter in front of  your group number when paying.
- Multiple       Group Numbers: list each group number and its       corresponding payment
- Date       of payment
- Contact       person’s name
- Contact       person's phone number
- Contact       person's fax number
- Contact       person's email address (if available)
Note: When paying multiple  dosimetry accounts, enter "Dosimetry" in the Description  Field instead of the Group Number or Client ID Number when prompted by the  EFT payment system.
For full details, visit the How  to Pay Health Canada Fees webpage.

## Adding a Purchase Order Number to your Account Activity Report (AAR)
Purchase Orders cover the period from April 1 to March 31 and  must include your Group Number , except when submitted with the Dosimetry  Service Agreement.
Send your Purchase Orders directly to NDS using one of the following  methods:
- Email: nds-snd@hc-sc.gc.ca Note:  The information submitted to NDS using the above email address will be  processed by Computer-Talk, a third party routing application used to support  the Call Centre's workflow. For more details on how the third party handles  your information, see Computer-Talk's Privacy Policy .
- Mail: National Dosimetry Services Health Canada 775 Brookfield Road, Address Locator  6301D Ottawa, Ontario, K1A 1C1
